violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -No running water on trailer. Glove changes without handwashing.
Mobile food service establishment. — --Water tank or supply was not of sufficient capacity to meet the demands of the food establishment. -Water was not working.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Beans on stove at 110F.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
